message:
bd-1k7c5: add A* routing scratch buffers + mermaid_layout benchmark

Pre-allocate RoutingScratch for find_path_astar_reuse to eliminate
per-edge heap allocation in route_all_edges. Uses sparse reset
(only clears dirtied indices) for efficient buffer reuse.

Also adds Criterion benchmarks for the mermaid_layout production path
(layout_diagram + route_all_edges), filling the benchmark gap
identified during profiling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -145,6 +145,11 @@ name = "diagram_layout_bench"
 harness = false
 required-features = ["diagram"]
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "mermaid_layout_bench"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["diagram"]
+
 [[test]]
 name = "backdrop_composition_tests"
 required-features = ["visual-fx"]
